code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate momentum indicators
    rsi = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window']).rsi()
    roc = ta.momentum.ROCIndicator(df['close'], window=params['roc_window']).roc()
    
    # Calculate volatility
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(
        df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=params['atr_window']
    ).average_true_range()
    
    # Generate signals
    long_condition = (rsi > params['rsi_threshold']) & (roc > params['roc_threshold']) & (atr > df['close'] * params['atr_pct_threshold'])
    short_condition = (rsi < (100 - params['rsi_threshold'])) & (roc < -params['roc_threshold']) & (atr > df['close'] * params['atr_pct_threshold'])
    
    signals = pd.Series(np.where(long_condition, 1, np.where(short_condition, -1, 0)), index=df.index).astype(int)
    return signals
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits strong momentum breakouts when RSI and ROC confirm overbought/oversold conditions combined with high volatility (ATR).
